instruction:
Let $P(x)$ be a polynomial with all integral coefficients between $0$ and $9$ , inclusive, and $P(-2) = P(-5) = 2006$ . If $P(x)$ has degree $n$ , then denote $a_k$ as the coefficient of $x^k$ . Find $100a_n + 10a_{n-1} + a_{n-2}$ .

Options:
A. 161
B. 162
C. 166
D. 169
E. 163
F. 164
G. 160
H. 165
I. 168
J. 167
